title: Children's Understanding of Representational Change and Its Relation to the Understanding of False Belief and the Appearance-Reality Distinction
abstract: Alison Gopnik, Janet W. Astington, Children's Understanding of Representational Change and Its Relation to the Understanding of False Belief and the Appearance-Reality Distinction, Child Development, Vol. 59, No. 1 (Feb., 1988), pp. 26-37
